error_signature: NodeApiError: The resource you are looking for is restricted. (403)
title: 403 Forbidden error from eBay node
symptom: When executing a step in the eBay node, n8n returns a 403 Forbidden error, indicating access issues. This occurs even when credentials appear to be connected successfully.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node or integration
root_cause: The 403 Forbidden error indicates that the request is reaching eBay but is being denied due to insufficient permissions or incorrect scopes. This can happen if the OAuth2 tokens have expired or if the required permissions for the specific API action are not granted.
fix_steps: Reconnect your eBay credentials in n8n to refresh the tokens.
Verify that the scopes in n8n match the permissions required for the API actions you are trying to perform.
Test a basic request like 'get account details' to check connectivity.
agent_instruction: Reconnect your eBay credentials and ensure the scopes are correctly set.
